lines.speaker: Tarfol quo Maten
lines.text: Greetings human. These Hydras are not to be harmed unless you have permission. To act otherwise would be a danger to the balance.

sections.title: When attempting to kill hydras outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Tarfol quo Maten
lines.text: Human! To attack these creatures would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight them!
